name: Metastatic Melanoma (DFCI, Nat Med. 2019) - iAtlas Harmonized
description:
Whole-exome sequencing and neoantigen landscape analysis of 122 patients with metastatic melanoma treated with anti-PD1 ICB, along with their matched normal samples. The reprocessing of raw sequencing data is coordinated by CRI iAtlas.
Related Dataset: This is a harmonized subset of the original 144-sample DFCI study with standardized mutation calling and extended immunogenomics annotations.
